risk_title: Land Contestation at Newton Solar Park Site
risk_summary: Seven people claim ownership of a small parcel of land within the Newton solar park project site. The land dispute emerged after contractor mobilization in February 2025, despite prior government land conveyance documentation and stakeholder consultations. This threatens project implementation timeline and may require compensation payments or site redesign.
evidence_quote: Land issue at Newton- About 7 people claim the ownership of a small parcel of land on one edge of the project land. This issue emerged around February 14, 2025 after the contractor began clearing the ground. Before this date, despite extensive stakeholder consultations, there was no issue reported.

risk_title: Contested Land Claims at Newton Site Requiring Ministerial Intervention
risk_summary: Land acquisition disputes at Newton have escalated to ministerial level discussions involving Ministry of Energy, Ministry of Lands, and Ministry of Agriculture. Multiple households have logged grievances over land portions within the designated construction area, requiring government intervention to resolve before civil works can proceed.
evidence_quote: The issue is currently in Ministerial level discussions by Ministry of Energy, Ministry of Lands and Ministry of Agriculture and Food Security. The outcome of these sessions is expected to bring a lasting solution for the outstanding land related issue in the Newton site.

risk_title: Potential Project Affected Persons (PAPs) Compensation Liability
risk_summary: If land claims at Newton are validated, the project faces financial and implementation risks from compensating PAPs or redesigning the solar park to avoid claimed land. The mission advised the contractor to prepare an alternate design contingency.
evidence_quote: While the disputed land is small in acreage and is limited to one edge of the project, if the issue persists the project will have to decide whether to pay compensation to the PAPs or redesign the solar park to avoid the claimed land.
